review_title: Zluri- A flexible SMP to sort out your SaaS chaos
author: Megha S.
pros: Zluri is such a flexible and easy to use SaaS management tool that provides detailed reporting and an easy to use UI
cons: SaaS management is still in it's nascent stages in our organization so we don't have any dislikes yet
author_profession: Senior Executive: Research and Financial Analyst

review_title: Audits are slightly less painful now
description: I use it when we are getting audited based on ISO27001, because I do not want to get in trouble. It helps us with onboarding and offboarding, so we are not throwing money at ex-employees (this happens a lot).
author: Ramesh V.
pros: The tool makes tracking of all of our contracts a lot easier as they are all stored in one place, thus preventing us from wasting money on an auto renewal of services that we no longer need. I am staring at a dead pixel on my monitor as I write this. It even recognizes the hidden apps that people have and I didn't know it could do that either.
cons: The Workflow Editor is awful. You cannot add labels to help tell me what is going on with each piece of the workflow so you have to go through each little box to find out what it is and I lose my mind. The AI features are not perfect so we still end up typing everything in anyway.

review_title: Ease of use
author: Shubham S.
pros: Easily can get the consumption of license.
cons: Nothing, it appears to be an excellent product.

review_title: Offering detailed insights and automation
author: Alejandro R.
pros: Zluri’s integrations ensured that Zluri effortlessly connected data from the HR and finance stacks in our SaaS landscape. Such significant benefits are derived from the automated alerts for contract renewals and made it possible to avoid any accord deadline or lapse.​
cons: The platform could misidentify some applications every now and then, causing unnecessary alerts.

review_title: Enabled us to fine tune our SaaS portfolio properly
author: Emma C.
pros: Zluri’s tools also offered detailed breakdowns of SaaS spend for more efficient cost control and opportunities for savings. I found particularly useful the recommendations regarding the overlapping tools to establish a consolidation strategy.​
cons: I noted that the reporting function was not very flexible regarding customization of reports for stakeholders’ needs and expectations.

review_title: Get 100% visibility over your SaaS stack
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The moment we onboarded Zluri, little did we know that we are going to fall in love with robust operating system for SaaS. Within few minutes it analyzed our entire SaaS stack and gave us the all the insights from users, usage, costs etc of all the SaaS apps present. We also loved the employee onboarding and offboarding feature which is a sure shot time saver. The custom built templates gave access to SaaS tools for new employees based on their roles. So, we didn't need to individually give access to each and every employee. Also, with the offboarding feature, we are able to safely revoke access and have a backup of the critical data of employees exiting the organization.
cons: No drawbacks for now. overall its a good experiene

review_title: A must have tool for businesses
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The renewal alerts and the visibility over the SaaS ecosystem are what I love the most. It used to feel like getting locked into a vendor when an application auto-renews without our notice. Now with Zluri, we get alerts weeks before the actual renewal date. So we have time to decide whether we have to renew the tool or cancel the subscription. And when a new tool is added to the SaaS landscape, we immediately get alerts on who has signed up and how much is spent, which is essential to calculate the overall spend and budget.
cons: I don't have any dislikes about Zluri's product
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zluri and SaaS managament are like bread and butter
author: Anshul G.
pros: The renewal alerts and the visibility of your SaaS stack is what I love the most about Zluri.The team has been amazing to work with. They are very helpful when we need help and very responsive. Zluri's easy to deploy. Even the integrations! You can get started right away without any intervention!
cons: Nothing much! Just would love to see see more API connectors for SaaS applications. But it is a part of their roadmap.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zluri, a hassle-free SaaS management
author: Raksha S.
pros: It surfaces my SaaS landscape within 5 miutes of onboarding. From a single dashboard I can find the users, usage and spend for a particular application. Unlike managing SaaS in a spreadsheet, Zluri saves time and labor.
cons: Nothing as of now. We have been using Zluri for few months now and the result has been satisfactory
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Contract renewals simplified
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We love the user-friendliness of the tool. Zluri helps us keep a tab of our SaaS contracts and renewals and removes the element of surprise usually associated with them. New features and improvements get updated regularly.
cons: Nothing, given that they're an early stage company
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful SaaS Management Platform, for teams of all sizes
description: Phenomenal support from Customer Success team, who helped us get started with the platform, without any friction.
author: Shikhar B.
pros: The product integrated seamlessly with our stack, and was able to discover all active/inactive SaaS subscriptions that our team was using. Identification of upcoming subscription renewal helps in discovering under-utilized subscriptions, and thereby, helping us reduce cost.
cons: While Zluri has the most exhaustive number of integrations available as compared to all other tools in the market, there's always room for more. The best part is that the team understands this, and works with you to enable the integrations.

review_title: Bird's eye view of SaaS landscape
author: Sajid R.
pros: It took just a day for Zluri to find out all the SaaS applications that are being used in our organization. To our surprise the numbers were four times more than we have ever anticipated. Now that we have the control in our hands, we can decide what to have and what to discard. Also, if you have been shaken by the vulnerabilities of shadow IT, Zluri traces shadow IT within its roots and notifies you. It is a win-win for all the companies looking to invest in an efficient as well as cost-effective SaaS management tool.
cons: Some minor issues that are normal to any SaaS platform. Their CS team fixed it in a timely way

review_title: Our SaaS management issues sorted
author: santhan C.
pros: Zluri came as the perfect solution we were looking for in the pandemic, while working remote. We needed a tool that can automatically onboard and offboard employees to SaaS apps and and oversee all the SaaS apps that are running in our organization. Since employees were working remotely there were few roadblocks in giving them access to the essential tools they need to complete their daily tasks. Also, when remote employees leave the organization, we wanted to make sure that their complete access was revoked. Zluri helped us solve this issue through it automated onboarding and offboarding workflows. Now we can give and revoke access within few clicks, making the whole process pretty seamless.
cons: Nothing as of now , everything seems to be good

review_title: Saved us time, effort and $$$
author: Abhay E.
pros: It automated our complete discovery part of our software stack
cons: We found a coupWe found a couple of minor bugs that is normal to any platform. Was taken care of swiftlyle of minor bugs that is normal to any platform. Was taken care of swiftly

review_title: Best in class product
description: Experience is outstanding and very well built too!
author: Anush J.
pros: Easy to use and run over with your teams
cons: Noting as of now, everything is good! Highly recommend it to other executives as well.

review_title: On the road to compliance and control
description: I really appreciate the effort made by Zluri team to develop an application with hundreds of integrations of cloud services. We used with Atlassian, Microsoft, Google Workspace and so on… They also developed agents to keep track of license usage for applications installed on private servers. It is a nice feature, but it should be reviewed and upgraded. We use this software to keep tracks of our licenses, contracts and subscriptions. We are in the process of onboarding our data on the application and the support is the key of Zluri team.
author: Alessio C.
pros: The support is very flexible and fast to find solutions.
cons: The software sometimes is lagging but works, the user experience is not too much affected.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get hold of your SaaS expenses from a single dashboard
author: Sreedhar B.
pros: Zluri's SaaS Management Platform has made it super easy to keep count of all SaaS expenses in its fully automated dashboard which would be rather time consuming when done manually.
cons: We don't have any dislikes to mention as of now

review_title: On the road to compliance and control!
author: Alexander N.
pros: Easy start and discovery phase - gave us an immediate better understanding of software and apps used by employees in various locations. Holistic and innovative approach to managing all the software within a company's technology portfolio. Very responsive CS team and continuous improvement.
cons: Nothing specific. Zluri is a young company and we are new to the concept, we are both improving as we go along.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zluri is the easiest SaaS management tool to use
author: Kalyan M.
pros: I'm impressed with everything related to Zluri right from the onboarding. Within 5 minutes of signing into the product, we discovered and optimized all our SaaS subscriptions and their users. I was seamlessly able to discover and manage my entire SaaS stack through their intuitive dashboard.
cons: Nothing as of now
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: IT team's best friend
author: Rakesh M P.
pros: Zluri is a frictionless product. You can view your organization's entire SaaS ecosystem after just a couple of integrations. It helped us completely transition away from using spreadsheets to manage our SaaS and helped us discover shadow IT and get rid of unused subscriptions.
cons: Can't think of any negatives at the moment
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zluri-Feedback
description: Good to work with Zluri Platform.
author: Prabhakar D.
pros: Friendly use and good to get the reports
cons: As of now no such things to describe so fare good to go.

review_title: V.Good SaaS Management Tool
author: Mustafa U.
pros: Onboarding and Offboarding services and the customer support
cons: Nothing for now, no issues so far, I am happy with the software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Makes SaaS Spend Management a Breeze
author: Yasaswy P.
pros: We deployed Zluri to cut down on our SaaS spend and it did exactly that. The product is great and we always had help at hand from Zluri to achieve what we set out to.
cons: Nothing specific. We like everything as of today.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easiest tool to manage your SaaS
author: Arun K.
pros: Very intuitive and gets SaaS maangement done without any hassles
cons: We don't have any dislikes for the product in its early stage
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Really great product, customer support is top notch
author: Patrick C.
pros: The entire setup process was very easy. I didn’t have any issues or need for onboarding. It auto detected my other software and I was off to the races.
cons: They’re definitely still in the early stages of their product. It lacks a few of the process automation tools and workflows that I would generally expect from such software. But I have spoken with their support team and all of these features are currently under development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
